headline: Rosaria’s having a belter as Mexico and South Africa keep rolling
text: Rosaria had a lovely little afternoon: Mexico swatted Czech Republic (Carolina) aside, and South Africa edged South Korea (Christopher), so Rosaria stays right on Max’s heels. Max still had the biggest win of the lot though, with Brazil giving Scotland (Henry) a proper going-over. Henry’s the main loser from the round, with Carolina and Christopher also taking hits. Overall, Max is still best on 17 points, while Sofia is bottom on 4 and looking a touch grim.
